synopsis:
The story of a wild boy named Sarumaru Sarutani and his growth as a pro golfer, mastering new techniques and gaining new comrades while confronting Mr. X and his shadow golf organization.

(Source: IMDB)

title.romaji: Pro Golfer Saru: Super GOLF World e no Chousen!!
title.native: プロゴルファー猿 スーパーGOLFワールドへの挑戦!!

title.romaji: Pro Golfer Saru: Kouga Hikyou! Kage no Ninpou Golfer Sanjou!
title.native: プロゴルファー猿 甲賀秘境! 影の忍法ゴルファー参上!
